About: It is about the German airborne invasion of Crete during World War II.
AssociatedWith: It is associated with Simulations Publications Inc. (SPI).
ConsistsOf: It consists of two large maps.
It consists of hundreds of counters.
HasA: It has two large 22" x 34" hex grid maps.
It has a large number of rules.
It has one long 60-turn campaign game.
HasFeatureOf: It is characterized by complex rules.
It is characterized by two large 22" x 34" hex grid maps.
It is characterized by a large number of rules.
It is characterized by several short scenarios.
It is characterized by one long 60-turn campaign game.
InfluencedBy: It was influenced by SPI's previous publication, Highway to the Reich.
IsA: It is a two-player board wargame.
It is an excellent simulation of history.
It is not to be recommended as a first purchase by a new gamer.
It is an excellent simulation for the historian or experienced gamer who enjoys a difficult battle situation.
It is a very interesting and intricate game.
It is hopelessly big and complex for most classroom situations.
PublishedBy: It was published by Simulations Publications Inc. (SPI).
UsedFor: It is used for play balance.
UsedTo: It is used to purposefully force several situations that occurred historically to re-occur in the game.

それは60ターンの長いキャンペーンゲームを含んでいます。
